title: Node permutation equivariance for MeshGraphNets cylinder-flow graphs

parameters.inverse_permutation: inverse bijection used to restore output order

transformation_preconditions: The graph uses node-indexed tensors for x, pos, and y.
The face/cell connectivity is expressed by node indices and is updated by the same permutation.
The model inference path is deterministic for the source and follow-up executions.

boundary_condition_compatibility.reason: Node types, coordinates, targets, and face connectivity are reindexed together; physical geometry and boundary categories are not changed.

output_mapping.description: Apply inverse_permutation to the follow-up output before comparing it with the source output.

tolerance.source: theory/MeshGraphNets圆柱绕流MetBench_MR资产编制与验证说明.md

exclusion_rules: Exclude cases where graph fields required by the permutation are absent.
Exclude cases where the node permutation is not a bijection.
Exclude nondeterministic runtime configurations from verdict generation.

verdict_interpretation.pass: The observed run satisfied the design-time relation under the declared tolerance.
verdict_interpretation.fail: The observed run exceeded the declared tolerance and requires investigation.
verdict_interpretation.skip: The run was not executed because prerequisites were absent or disabled.
verdict_interpretation.out-of-relation-domain: The source case did not satisfy the relation preconditions.
verdict_interpretation.numerical-tolerance-issue: The result was dominated by numeric or determinism uncertainty.
verdict_interpretation.inconclusive: The run did not provide enough evidence for pass/fail classification.

claim_limitations: This card is a design-time MR asset. It does not report SUT execution, pass/fail status, violation rates, or reliability conclusions.
